summary: Frontend-only visual regression test of the 'Inscrições' table column alignment in the donas admin panel (SPA hash route #/inscricoes). PASS — all 7 columns (CANDIDATO, CPF, DISPOSITIVO, VALOR, STATUS, INSCRIÇÃO EM, AÇÕES) are correctly aligned with their content. Verified via computed grid-template-columns equality and bounding-box center/edge comparisons between header cells and row cells. All 3 test inscrições render with full data and no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning on Dashboard: Recharts ResponsiveContainer reports width(-1)/height(-1) — chart container has no measurable size on initial mount. Not related to Inscrições alignment, but worth fixing by giving the chart wrapper a defined minHeight/minWidth or aspect ratio.
test_credentials: Admin painel: donas / Seinao10@@ (used as provided)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 3 test inscrições (JOAO DA SILVA SANTOS, MARIA OLIVEIRA COSTA, PEDRO HENRIQUE LIMA).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Donas admin panel uses hash-routing under /donaspainel/. Login via 2 inputs (user, password) + 'Entrar' button. The .dp-table-card uses CSS grid (.dp-tbl-head and .dp-tbl-row share grid-template-columns: 1.7fr 1fr .9fr .8fr 1.1fr 1.1fr .9fr). Header/row alignment per column: 1 left, 2-6 center, 7 right. Verified computed grids identical across head/rows and all per-column alignment offsets are within sub-pixel (0.0) tolerance.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — adjustment verified working. The previously applied CSS override (grid-template-columns shared + nth-child text-align per column) is correctly producing pixel-aligned columns.
